hausa.for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: Ga lokutan PM bayan tsakar rana, ka cire 12 daga sa'a.
hausa.for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: Ga lokutan AM, sa'a ta kasance iri ɗaya.
hausa.move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Ka motsa wani representation ka kalli yadda analog, 12-hour, da 24-hour lokaci ke kasancewa a haɗe.
hausa.break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Ka raba interval zuwa sauƙaƙan jumps har zuwa cikakkiyar sa'a, sannan ka haɗa jumps.
hausa.the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: Interval sifili ne, don haka farawa da ƙarewa iri ɗaya ne.
hausa.use_24_hour_form_such_as_13_25: Ka yi amfani da 24-hour tsari, kamar 13:25.
hausa.use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: Ka yi amfani da 12-hour tsari da AM ko PM.
hausa.enter_a_time_such_as_13_25_or_1_25_pm: Ka shigar da lokaci, kamar 13:25 ko 1:25 PM.
hausa.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Ka shigar da minti ko duration, kamar sa'a 1 minti 15.
hausa.not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: Ba tukuna ba. Ka zana jumps tsakanin lokuta biyu ka sake gwadawa.
hausa.compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Ka kwatanta tsawon events, free-time gaps, da faɗin cikakken shiri.
hausa.mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Ka yiwa lokuta biyu alama a number line. Ka yi tsalle zuwa cikakkiyar sa'a mai sauƙi, ka ƙara cikakkun sa'o'i, sannan ka gama da sauran minti.
hausa.use_24_hour_form_such_as_18_40: Ka yi amfani da 24-hour tsari, kamar 18:40.
hausa.enter_a_time_such_as_18_40_or_6_40_pm: Ka shigar da lokaci, kamar 18:40 ko 6:40 PM.
hausa.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Ka shigar da minti ko duration, kamar sa'a 2 minti 15.
hausa.not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: Ba tukuna ba. Ka yi amfani da agogo, timeline, ko minti bayan tsakar dare.
hausa.moving_to_another_missed_challenge: Ana matsawa zuwa wani challenge da aka rasa.
hausa.retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Retry set ya cika. Ana komawa dukkan challenges.
hausa.a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: Kwararren practice set mai ƙarfi da tabbaci mai difficulty bands da queue da aka mai da hankali kan sake yin waɗanda aka rasa.
hausa.solved_currently_viewing_challenge: an warware; challenge da ake kallo yanzu
hausa.durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Ana iya shigar da durations a jimlar minti ko a sa'o'i da minti.
hausa.use_two_digit_24_hour_form_hh_mm: Ka yi amfani da 24-hour tsari mai lambobi biyu (HH:MM).
hausa.you_may_use_either_12_hour_or_24_hour_: Kana iya amfani da 12-hour ko 24-hour tsari.
hausa.draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Ka zana jumps zuwa cikakkiyar sa'a mai sauƙi.
hausa.convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Ka canza kowane lokaci zuwa minti bayan tsakar dare.
hausa.for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: Ga farawar da ta ɓace, ka ƙirga baya daga ƙarshe.
hausa.crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Ƙetare tsakar dare yana fara sabon 24-hour cycle.
hausa.see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: Ka ga lokaci, ka ƙirga lokaci, ka tsara lokaci, ka bayyana strategy naka.
hausa.a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: Lokacin agogo da yawan lokaci abubuwa ne dabam. Ka rubuta units tare da durations.
hausa.no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: Babu timer pressure · keyboard friendly · da text alternatives
